local_sources: Deep Research report, cited sources and validation configuration
local_processing: Check URLs and deterministic citation structure

codex_context.purpose: Judge whether each cited source supports the report claim
codex_context.content: Report claims, surrounding language, citations, relevant source passages and validation diagnostics
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use claim-level passages and cited-source excerpts; load broader report or source context only when meaning depends on it

residual_risks.risk: Claims and cited passages may reproduce case-specific facts from the research request
residual_risks.mitigation: Validate at claim level and use only the surrounding text and source passages needed to judge support

commercialista_notice.message_it: Il report viene scomposto e controllato localmente. Codex esamina le singole affermazioni, il contesto necessario e i passaggi delle fonti citate per valutarne il supporto.
commercialista_notice.message_en: The report is parsed and checked locally. Codex reviews individual claims, necessary context and cited-source passages to assess support.

limitations: Some claims require wider report or source context to avoid a misleading validation
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
